title: Arcanum Unbound
description: Arcanum Unbound - is a mod that adds magic and artifact crafting. You as a wizard need to become strongest. The mod has an experimental philosophy of sacrifice and the price of strength, be ready for the challenges.
body:
# Arcanum Unbound

**Arcanum Unbound** is a dark-fantasy magic mod for **Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge)** focused on personal power, dangerous knowledge, and unstable progression.

This is not an ore-grind magic mod.  
Power comes from mastering **mana, sigils, relics, corruption, and forbidden soul mechanics**.

## Core Features

### Mana, Instability, and Corruption
Each player grows around a personal mana profile. Strong magic always comes at a cost: high-output casting builds **instability**, and **Abyss corruption** is part of the core risk-reward loop.

### Modular Sigil Magic
Spells are built from sigils in a dedicated interface. **Cores, forms, and modifiers** combine into different costs, behaviors, combat roles, and late-game builds.

### Progression Through Knowledge
Deeper magic is unlocked through key items, milestones, and survival choices. You do not start with full control over the system.

### Artifacts and Relics With Tradeoffs
Artifacts roll unique identities with powerful strengths and dangerous flaws. Weapons, relics, rings, and other wearable pieces support real build variety instead of simple stat stacking.

### Soul Mechanics and Death Manipulation
Forbidden rituals can store power in soul-bound objects and alter how death works. In multiplayer, this creates high-stakes interactions and dangerous long-term consequences.

### Weapon Imprinting
Rare imprinting allows existing weapons to be branded with special materials through smithing. Different materials create different combat identities rather than acting as simple upgrades.

### Rare World Discoveries
The world hides deeper magical finds, including **warped geode materials**, **structure relics**, and the ultra-rare **Deepwater Abyss** biome with its own hostile life.

### In-Game Guidebook
A full in-game guidebook provides progression help, crafting references, boss guidance, and system explanations, making the mod learnable in survival without depending on external wikis.

## World Style

**No new dimensions. Vanilla structures still matter.**

Arcanum Unbound stays grounded in the base world while adding rare and dangerous discoveries that make exploration feel heavier, stranger, and more deliberate.

## Utility and Flavor

- Structure Compass support for progression routing
- Visual corruption layer at high Abyss infection
- Ongoing UI, FX, SFX, and model polish
- Expanded Curios integration for relic builds

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.1
- **Loader:** NeoForge
- **Recommended NeoForge:** 21.1.219+
- **Dependency:** Curios API
- **support:** [boosty](https://boosty.to/strdsts)
